hooks.command: d=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$d" ] && exit 0; printf "%s" "$d" | grep -q "TODO.md" && exit 0; h=$( { printf "%s" "$d"; git diff HEAD 2>/dev/null; } | sha1sum | cut -c1-40 ); sf="$HOME/.claude/.todo-reminder-$(pwd | sha1sum | cut -c1-12)"; [ -f "$sf" ] && [ "$(cat "$sf" 2>/dev/null)" = "$h" ] && exit 0; printf "%s" "$h" > "$sf"; printf '{"systemMessage":"\ud83d\udcdd TODO.md may be stale: uncommitted changes present but TODO.md untouched. Update it if a task completed, scope/direction changed, or work halted \u2014 and sync docs if merging to main.","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"update-todo reminder: the working tree has uncommitted changes but TODO.md was not modified. If you completed a task, changed direction/scope, or halted work before finishing, update TODO.md NOW (mark [x] + one-line result / revise scope + why / append a status note). If you are merging to main, ALSO run the merge-to-main doc-sync: update CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and every affected CONTEXT.md so the docs reflect the change. If nothing here is tracked in TODO.md, no change is needed \u2014 say so explicitly."}}'
